result.summary: Wizehire exposes one documented REST Public API plus one OAuth-protected MCP server; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
result.description: Wizehire is a hiring platform for small and midsize businesses that supports job posting, applicant tracking, candidate evaluation, and onboarding workflows. It also powers public job listings and related integrations for recruiting and HR workflows.

wizehire_api_key.label: Wizehire API key
wizehire_api_key.setup: Sign in to the Wizehire ATS, open the [Integrations tab](https://ats.wizehire.com/account/integrations) in **Account Settings**, and copy your unique API key. Wizehire's help article says this key is used when connecting Wizehire to Zapier.

wizehire_oauth_app.label: Wizehire OAuth client
wizehire_oauth_app.setup: Register or obtain OAuth client credentials through Wizehire's MCP/API gateway flow described by the gateway's service documentation at [API gateway documentation](https://api.gateway.wizehire.com/documentation). The authorization server metadata shows `authorization_code` and `client_credentials` grants, with token endpoint auth `client_secret_post`; use the client id and client secret issued by Wizehire with `https://api.gateway.wizehire.com/authorize` and `https://api.gateway.wizehire.com/oauth/token` as needed by your client.
